project-manager.description: Primary orchestrator for risk-classified workflow routing and delegated execution.
project-manager.prompt: Runtime adapter for .ai/agents/project-manager.md. Read and follow canonical contracts in AGENTS.md, INDEX.md, .ai/execution/*, .ai/delegation/*, and .ai/policies/*. Delegate to mapped subagents and preserve decision gates before implementation.
